commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=2e0af10bb0df1c6d4d84e71fd4a640c93c224bbe)
commands.review_summary:
The PR changes PI embedded-runner auth loading to include scoped Claude CLI external OAuth only when Claude CLI auth can be selected, with regression tests for runtime external snapshots and SecretRef auth-profile preservation.

PR surface: Source +241, Tests +531, Docs +1. Total +773 across 5 files.

Reproducibility: no. live end-user reproduction was run here, but the source path is clear: current main uses the static-only PI auth store, while the PR adds synthetic tests for the Claude CLI OAuth overlay path.
commands.review_followup: Needs contributor or maintainer action rather than automated repair because real behavior proof is missing for an auth-provider change and the protected maintainer label requires explicit handling.

target.title: fix: load Claude CLI OAuth for PI auth profiles
target.body:
## Summary

- Keep SecretRef/auth-profile startup snapshots static-only while loading scoped Claude CLI external OAuth only at PI run time when that auth can actually be selected.
- Cover Claude CLI OAuth selected by config order, persisted auth-store order, explicit PI runtime, runtime policy, stale auto session profiles, and direct Anthropic auth with Claude CLI fallback.
- Preserve static Anthropic PI auth on the no-external auth-profile store path.

Refs #86756.

## Verification

- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local` (clean: no accepted/actionable findings)
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/pi-embedded-runner/run.overflow-compaction.test.ts src/agents/model-runtime-aliases.test.ts src/agents/auth-profiles.external-cli-sync.test.ts src/agents/auth-profiles.external-cli-scope.test.ts -- --reporter=verbose` (6 files passed, 129 tests passed)
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/pi-embedded-runner/run.overflow-compaction.test.ts -- --reporter=verbose --testNamePattern "Claude CLI auth overlay|stale .*Claude CLI auth overlay|persisted auth-store order|ordered fallback profiles"` (2 files passed, 76 tests passed)
- `./node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/agents/pi-embedded-runner/run.ts src/agents/pi-embedded-runner/run.overflow-compaction.test.ts`
- `git diff --check`

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: PI embedded runs using Claude CLI OAuth no longer lose runtime-only Claude CLI credentials when the static SecretRef/auth-profile snapshot excludes external OAuth profiles.
Real environment tested: Local checkout with synthetic OAuth/auth-profile stores and PI embedded-runner harness; earlier branch proof also used direct AWS Crabbox Linux for the SecretRef/auth-profile regression tests.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/pi-embedded-runner/run.overflow-compaction.test.ts src/agents/model-runtime-aliases.test.ts src/agents/auth-profiles.external-cli-sync.test.ts src/agents/auth-profiles.external-cli-scope.test.ts -- --reporter=verbose` and `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/pi-embedded-runner/run.overflow-compaction.test.ts -- --reporter=verbose --testNamePattern "Claude CLI auth overlay|stale .*Claude CLI auth overlay|persisted auth-store order|ordered fallback profiles"`.
Evidence after fix: Focused proof passed 6 files / 129 tests; regression repro filter passed 2 files / 76 tests.
Observed result after fix: PI runs load `ensureAuthProfileStore(... externalCliProviderIds: ["claude-cli"], allowKeychainPrompt: false)` when Claude CLI OAuth is selected by config auth order, persisted auth-store order, runtime policy, explicit PI runtime, or fallback order, while static Anthropic auth continues using `ensureAuthProfileStoreWithoutExternalProfiles`.
What was not tested: Real Claude OAuth credentials or a live Claude provider request in this patch; tests use synthetic credential material and mocked PI runtime auth stores.
target.author: joshavant

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
